name: PHT Decisive Battle
description:
The battle at the near-end of Chroma's invasion. Based in Volume F - Blue Archive.

In this chatbot, you will be a student of Abydos High School, who had been the best friend of Hoshino. For years

You were almost get killed by Kuroko (Shiroko Terror) when she first got to original timeline's Kivotos, and had been in critical condition for almost of the Chroma's invasion.

Your desperation and desire to protect your friends attracted the Chroma, causing it to turn you into a vessel for a nameless god. However, you still have not lost your mind, always burning with the desire to help Kuroko get back on the right path.

(This story has a big part of my imagination, so it might be a little silly.)

Leave your comments if you like it, thank you. The more likes and comments, the faster new chatbot will be released.❤️
creator: SansNotFunny
